place: Uluwatu, Pecatu, South Kuta, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia
title: Off-Plan Four-Bedroom Sea-View Villa in Uluwatu
blurb: An off-plan architectural villa set high on the Uluwatu ridge, where four en-suite bedrooms open to sea views across Bali's southern peninsula. Three levels wrap a private pool, a home cinema, a games room and a fitness studio — delivered fully furnished and ready to move into on a 48-year lease.
detail:
Set on the elevated southern peninsula of Uluwatu, this off-plan residence is designed for buyers drawn to architecture with presence and privacy with atmosphere. Sheer glass elevations, dark stone and clean horizontal lines give the house a deliberate, gallery-like calm, while wide openings draw the sea and the tropical garden straight into the living spaces. Completion is scheduled for 2026, and the villa is offered fully furnished.

Arranged over three levels, the home holds four en-suite bedrooms and five bathrooms, each finished in a restrained palette of timber, black marble and soft plaster. The main level runs from an open-plan kitchen with a central island through to dining and living areas that sit almost flush with the outdoors; a floating staircase and marble-lined corridors connect the floors. Every bedroom reads as a quiet retreat, several opening to private balconies framed by greenery.

Leisure is built into the plan rather than added as an afterthought. A dedicated home cinema, a games room with its own bar and a fully equipped fitness studio occupy the lower level, while the garden level is given over to a private swimming pool, sun terraces and lawn shaded by mature frangipani. It is a house conceived for resort-style living at home — entertaining, wellness and long, unhurried days.

The 479 m² of interior sits on a 500 m² plot within one of Bali's most sought-after and fast-evolving addresses, minutes from Uluwatu's cliff beaches, surf breaks and dining. Offered on a 48-year leasehold. We can share the full floor plans, specification and payment schedule on request.
